arguments.argument:
event_inherited() makeActive() image_speed=0
//Enemy base statistics eName="Turn Cannon" eLevel=18 maxLife=200 life=maxLife pointWorth=26 atkPower=6 resType[0]=2 resType[1]=2 resType[2]=4 resType[5]=2 stunResist=3 baseItemChance=65 baseDropIndex=75 affiliation=4 hitSound=global.snd_EnemyHitMM dieSound=0 dieEffect=0
shotProg=0
jeremyText="A rotating cannon from the Mega Man X series that shoots in two directions, either horizontally or diagonally. Mostly they appear on the ceilings or floors, but in some cases they are on flying platforms. I found this info on the Mega Man Wiki." chaoText="I know Claire is very familiar with these things, but under the Virus' rules, they can't be taken out in 2 hits... well technically they can..." devText="Another enemy that I recycled from an earlier game. They're a good obstacle and made sense to reuse."
